issues_fixed: The Review step no longer contains the Contact dropdowns, so DOM-only validation incorrectly returned Select a district.
Signed-out visitors could enter the Post Ad wizard before authentication.
new_behavior: District and City are saved while the Contact step is visible and reused on Review and Publish.
A signed-out visitor opening /post is redirected immediately to Create Account.
The returnTo value points back to /post after signup or login.
Home, search, categories and ad detail pages stay public.
